title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Nykaa Retail

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Nykaa Retail
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Nykaa Retail in Noida is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Nykaa Retail:
Nykaa Retail is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nykaa Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
